title: TF2 Flamethrowers [CIT]
description: A pack that changes the model and texture of bows to the various flamethrowers in Team Fortress 2 upon renaming
body:
This pack changes the texture and model of bows to the various Team Fortress 2 flamethrowers upon renaming:

Flamethrower

Backburner

Degreaser

Phlogistinator

Dragon's Fury

Rainblower

(all namings are case sensitive and must be written as above to function correctly)
